comments.body:
Hello Trent,

Good day!

Could you share more details of your query along with any screenshots, we can check and get back to you.

Best regards,

PluginHive

comments.body:
Good morning Sagar,



Yes, I have managed to get it working, I think 😊



We have recently gone through a change of ownership, and there is now a new owner for Healthie Wholesalers.

The new owners are Tamara South and David Fowler. We officially took over the business from Monday 13 April. Paul, the previous owner, will still be involved during a handover period for the next 4–6 weeks. Everything will stay the same, same name, same Shopify store, etc..



Trent is no longer with the business, so it would be appreciated if the account contact details could be updated accordingly.

Could you please let me know the best process for updating all contact details on the account?





Kind regards,

David Fowler
TND Ventures Pty Ltd
Trading as Healthie Wholesalers







![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/3iOFC3l5eNZt0nHxWuhicVze9/?name=image001.png)

**Healthie** **Wholesalers**
Unit 4, 31 Township Drive, Burleigh Heads, Gold Coast.
(07) 5576 5824
www.healthiewholesalers.com.au
https://www.instagram.com/healthie_wholesalers/

Good morning Sagar,

 

Yes, I have managed to get it working, I think 😊

 

We have recently gone through a change of ownership, and there is now a new owner for Healthie Wholesalers.

The new owners are Tamara South and David Fowler. We officially took over the business from Monday 13 April. Paul, the previous owner, will still be involved during a handover period for the next 4–6 weeks. Everything will stay the same, same name, same Shopify store, etc..

 

Trent is no longer with the business, so it would be appreciated if the account contact details could be updated accordingly.

Could you please let me know the best process for updating all contact details on the account?

comments.body:
Hi David,

Thank you for the update regarding the change in ownership, and we’re glad to hear everything is now working.

To proceed with updating the account contact details, could you please confirm the new phone number and email address that should be set as the primary contact?

Once we have these details, we will update the account accordingly.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi David,
 
Thank you for the update regarding the change in ownership, and we’re glad to hear everything is now working.
 
To proceed with updating the account contact details, could you please confirm the new phone number and email address that should be set as the primary contact?
 
Once we have these details, we will update the account accordingly.
 
Looking forward to your response.
 
Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Priyanka Mukhia,



There is no change to the email addresses, as we are taking over the existing email accounts.



Please update the primary contact to me, David Fowler. Both Tamara and I monitor the email accounts and have joint authority on account matters.



Please let me know if you need anything further.



Kind regards,
David Fowler
comments.html_body:
